Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: You scream as loudly as you can, hoping to at least save the market-goers from ending up as Trork food.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: The Trork, however, appears nonplussed as he stares back at you, unmoving. Your yelling slowly trails off.

Entries.Name: Gronk
Entries.Line: Why do all human react same to Gronk?

Line.Text: Gronk hurt no-one, but human and running-plants always assume before asking!
